bom (sku x qty): BRK-2P-20A (20A 2-pole breaker) x 1; WIRE-NMB-12-2 (12/2 NM-B w/ ground copper cable) x 50; DISC-60A-NF (60A non-fused AC disconnect, NEMA 3R) x 1; MISC-STAPLE-NM (Insulated NM cable staples, box of 100) x 1

name: Sump pump dedicated circuit (GFCI)
labor_notes: Short dedicated run with GFCI breaker protection so the pump receptacle itself stays simple and dry-located.
bom (sku x qty): BRK-GFCI-1P-20A (20A 1-pole GFCI breaker, self-test) x 1; WIRE-NMB-12-2 (12/2 NM-B w/ ground copper cable) x 35; BOX-1G-OLDWORK (Single-gang old-work cut-in box w/ swing clamps) x 1; REC-20A-DUP (20A tamper-resistant duplex receptacle) x 1; PLT-1G (Single-gang wall plate) x 1; MISC-STAPLE-NM (Insulated NM cable staples, box of 100) x 1
